productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex NBA Bulls BP Red Backpacks
description: Talk about style and space rolled into one, and there's no better Sports bag for the Basketball freak than this Bulls backpack from adidas. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag makes for a great everyday wear for all Bulls fans out there.Capacity: 4 kgMade of polyester for durability, toughness and easy cleaningBranded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a dividerPrinted facade on the outside with iconic three stripesUtility pocket on the front with Bulls seal for storing essentialsPockets on the sides with contoured zippersadidas brand name and NBA seal printed on the side pocketsSynthetic haul loop for handling easeWide, adjustable shoulder straps and padded back for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesCareHand washClean with a damp cloth when necessaryDo not dry clean or machine washDo not bleachDo not tumble dryDo not wringLine dryDo not iron
